reason: The market is exhibiting strong markdown characteristics due to a confluence of negative factors. Geopolitical tensions (Iran/Trump) are directly impacting investor sentiment, causing a flight from risk assets including Bitcoin. Regulatory scrutiny (Binance probe) adds another layer of uncertainty, while traditional finance weakness (BlackRock fund issues) suggests potential contagion. Buyers quickly cashed out after a short-lived jump to $74,000, confirming this level as immediate resistance, and broad market indexes are trading lower across the board, signaling pervasive selling pressure. Extreme caution is advised.
headlines: BlackRock private credit fund is latest to crack, hitting crypto prices and DeFi markets
Bitcoin buyers are cashing out fast after short-lived jump to $74,000
Binance tells Senate probe no accounts sent crypto directly to Iran
'No deal with Iran': Trump demands unconditional surrender, sending oil surging, bitcoin and stocks lower
